question.text: When does a weekly currency futures contract expire?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Weekly currency futures expire every Friday at 12:30 PM. If Friday is a trading holiday, expiry moves to the previous trading day. **The Trap:** Equity weekly options expire on Thursday in India; currency weeklies expire on Friday. **Cross-Exam Context:** Weekly contract conventions are specific to Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** During the week when monthly contracts expire on a Friday, there are no weekly contracts — only the monthly contract expires.
